# Figure Assets

Export the following figures from the paper PDF and place them here.

| File | Source | Description |
|------|--------|-------------|
| `fig_overview.png` | Paper Fig 1 / Slide 18 | VALUEFLOW end-to-end pipeline (hero figure) |
| `fig_hives_results.png` | Paper Fig 5 / Slide 28 | HiVES vs UniVar vs Qwen3-0.6B bar chart |
| `fig_vidb.png` | Paper Fig 3 / Slides 33–34 | VIDB construction + ranking-based evaluation |
| `fig_steerability.png` | Paper Fig 4 / Slide 35 | Steerability by model — 3 regimes |
| `fig_valwise.png` | Paper Fig 6 / Slide 36 | Per-value steerability patterns |
| `fig_multival.png` | Paper Fig 8 / Slide 37 | Multi-value steering arrow plots + heatmap |

**Tip:** Use a PDF viewer (Preview, Acrobat, or `pdfimages`) to export at ≥2× resolution for retina displays.
